name: Gingerbread Waffles
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare waffle iron with cooking spray and heat up.
2. In a mixing bowl, combine flour, brown sugar, baking powder, baking soda, ginger, cinnamon, allspice, and salt.
3. In another mixing bowl, combine egg whites, buttermilk, and molasses.
4. Add the dry ingredients to the wet ingredients just until moistened.
5. Pour enough batter into the waffle iron to fill two-thirds of it.
6. Cook until crisp and golden brown. Set aside.
7. Repeat with remaining batter.
